author: james-tindal
description: Preview notes as Markmap mind maps.

manifest.description: View your Markdown as a mindmap
manifest.name: Mindmap NextGen

name: Mindmap NextGen

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Per-node styling and folding:
  * Style individual nodes and control their folding using inline HTML comments with CSS-style declarations

## New Contributors
* @romanbarczynski made their first contribution in https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/340

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.15.1...1.16.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Performance improvements and a bug fix in https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/298

Previously
* UI would freeze when navigating away from a large file
* Changing file settings with the UI tended to undo work or delete the whole file contents
* Embedded mindmaps would display at a dodgy zoom level


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.14.2...1.14.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.14.1...1.14.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed
* Fixed: Mindmaps were totally failing to work for users who had just installed the plugin.
* Appearance change: The toolbar now uses the default appearance that comes with markmap.
* Fixed: Some embeds were failing in unpinned mindmap tab
* Fixed: Was still sometimes using markmap font style instead of theme


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.14.0...1.14.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's Changed * supports obsidian internal embeds, including images (`![[]]` and `![]()` syntax) * always use the font specified by the theme. removed setting to turn this on or off **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/james-tindal/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.13.2...1.14.0 ## Embeds Screenshot of: * markdown embed * internal image embed * external image (sizing not working) Videos (too big):

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: use document title as root node (optionally) by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/77
* Re-render the inline markmap highlight when the setting changes by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/98
* Feat: Multiple mindmaps in multiple tabs by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/86
* feat: update colors when settings change by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/104
* feat: update map/tab title when title changed by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/105
* fix: code blocks crash render if more than one by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/100
* feat: can use the theme font or default by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/106
* fix badges by @noraj in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/107
* feat: inline mindmap highlight matches theme by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/109
* Documentation rewrite by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/110
* feat: mindmap codeblock bg-color matches theme by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/108
* fix: latex doesn't render in mindmaps by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/113

## New Contributors
* @noraj made their first contribution in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/107

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: code blocks crashing render by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/84
* Fix: Pin icon in wrong position, doesn't do anything by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/83
* Fix: #80. No unpin option by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/82
* Add screenshot background color to front-matter options by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/81
* fix(settings-tab): fix background style showing wrong option on render by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/76
* feat(settings-tab): Color settings display depending on color approach by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/75
* Fixes for settings tab (fixed) by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/90
* feat: colour freeze level hidden unless using branch colouring by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/92
* fix: single colour mode not working by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/95
* Settings versioning by @james-tindal in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/96

## New Contributors
* @james-tindal made their first contribution in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/84

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix xss by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/10

* fix: change slider to input by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/20
* fix: color 3 line width by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/21

* Fix screenshot by @AdrianSimionov in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/26
* feat: read frontmatter settings by @AdrianSimionov in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/27
* Issue 19 by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/31
* feat: copy image to clipboard by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/35
* Docs: update README.md by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/37
* feat: implementation of inline markmap by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/38
* docs: explanation of how to use frontmatter by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/47
* Implementation of Mindmap Toolbar by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/49
* Feat: add inline markmap highlight by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/52
* PNG Screenshot background to current theme by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/51

* Implement  checkmarks by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/36
* docs of issue 34 by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/53
* fix: updated inline bg and border color by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/54
* General adjusts by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/55
* Requested changes before submission to Obsidian Releases by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/57
* Bumped version and updated release .yml to prepare for release by @MasterTuto in https://github.com/verocloud/obsidian-mindmap-nextgen/pull/58
